originalTitle: Evidence of inconsistencies in evaluation process and selection of winners
content: Design high-quality benchmarks that go beyond recall to evaluate how frontier models truly reason, act, and judge.
chineseTitle: 评估过程和获奖者选择不一致的证据
chineseContent: 设计超越回忆的高质量基准，以评估前沿模型如何真正推理、行动和判断。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
